description: Deterministic tool-use enforcement policy for the PreToolUse hook (Kata 02). Distinct from the user-RAG files (guidelines/constraints/guardrails.json): this file is enforced in code by scripts/pre-tool-guard.sh and emits a deny decision before a tool runs. Edit freely; the hook hot-reloads on every call.

documented_sdk_limits.note: These thresholds illustrate Kata 02 for the Agent SDK (ClaudeAgentOptions.hooks). They are NOT enforced by the Claude Code bash hook, which only sees Bash/Write tool inputs; enforce them in your SDK PreToolUse hook via permissionDecision=deny.
